acceptance_criteria.text: For a network parent scope, content-plan context aggregates child locations plus the parent record instead of reading only the parent business id.
proof: Implemented network scope expansion and aggregate loaders in src/services/content_plan_service.py.

acceptance_criteria.text: Lukoil network parent context returns real map links and SEO keywords; map links must be greater than 0 and SEO keywords must be fuel/AZS-focused.
proof: Live API returned success=True, map_links_count=93, network_locations=93, seo=15.
SEO examples: лукойл, лукойл азс, лукойл заправка, азс рядом, заправка рядом, заправка на карте, круглосуточная азс, бензин 95.
gaps: Services remain absent because production userservices has no records for this network.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing content-plan generation and policy tests pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: source venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_content_plan_generation.py tests/test_content_plan_policy.py
known_gaps: Production services for Lukoil are not populated, so readiness still reports services as missing.
